name: Fresha Beauty & Wellness Booking API
what_it_does: Free appointment scheduling and marketplace platform for beauty and wellness businesses — enabling salons, spas, barbershops, and wellness professionals to manage bookings, payments, client management, and inventory with zero monthly fees (revenue from payment processing), plus a consumer marketplace for client discovery.
use_cases: Managing beauty salon appointments via Fresha API for multi-location management systems
Integrating Fresha booking data via partner API for CRM and business intelligence
Automating client communications via Fresha API for appointment reminders and marketing
Syncing Fresha calendar data via API for staff scheduling and resource optimization
Building integrations via Fresha API for POS and inventory management systems
not_for: Healthcare scheduling (Fresha is beauty/wellness only — use SimplePractice for healthcare)
Teams preferring subscription-based software without transaction fees
best_when: A beauty or wellness business wants a free booking platform (zero subscription fee) and needs API access for custom integrations — Fresha's marketplace drives client acquisition.
avoid_when: You need healthcare features, enterprise resource management, or prefer subscription model with more feature control.

auth.notes: OAuth2 for partner/developer integrations. API access requires Fresha partner program acceptance. Partner API available for approved integrators. Webhooks for booking events. Not self-serve API — requires partnership agreement with Fresha. Consumer API is separate from partner API. Contact developer@fresha.com for API access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Fresha is completely free for businesses (no monthly fee); 1.29% + £0.20 per payment transaction
pricing.paid_tiers: No paid tiers — revenue from payment processing only
pricing.notes: UK company (London). Founded 2015 (William Zeqiri, Nick Miller). Previously named Shedul ($50M+ raised as Fresha brand). Valued at $1B+ (unicorn status 2021). 100,000+ businesses on platform. 450M+ appointments booked. Zero subscription fee is major differentiator vs Mindbody/Vagaro. Revenue model: payment processing commission only. Consumer marketplace at fresha.com for client discovery. POS hardware available. Gift cards, memberships, packages. No-show protection. Team scheduling. Stock management. Operates in 120+ countries.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Partner API requires agreement. OAuth2. Webhooks. UK company (GDPR). Zero subscription fee — payment processing revenue. Unicorn ($1B+). Limited public API docs. Not self-serve.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Appointment reads idempotent by appointment ID. Webhook events: implement idempotent handlers (may retry). Limited documentation makes full assessment difficult.
known_agent_gotchas: API requires partner program — contact developer@fresha.com for access
Not self-serve: no immediate API key generation without partnership approval
Zero monthly fee model: Fresha earns from payment processing — business can opt for own payment
UK company — GDPR applies; UK/EU/US data residency
Consumer-facing discovery marketplace (fresha.com) drives client acquisition — not business API
Webhook events for booking lifecycle — implement idempotent handlers for reliability

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. OAuth2 for partner access. GDPR compliant (UK company). Client PII in booking data (name, contact, service history). UK/US/EU data residency. Partnership requirement reduces anonymous API exposure. Payment processing data handled securely (PCI DSS implied). Webhook delivery — implement signature validation.
